article_meta.title: Venezuelan Political Crisis Trump declares 'Venezuelan regime' a foreign terrorist organization, orders oil tanker block

reasoning: Multiple attribution violations by flagging Trump’s quoted statements as author bias, plus an incorrect claim of missing attribution. The article’s author prose contains little clear bias, so several flags are false positives.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged direct quotes from Trump as author bias in items 1 and 2, violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Items 1 and 2 are quoted material; item 3 wrongly claims no attribution despite 'according to the administration'; item 4 is speculative omission.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Little to no clear bias in the author’s connective prose was missed; any potential instances are marginal.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels applied to misattributed/quoted content and an incorrect 'Omission of Source Attribution' reduce type accuracy.
